\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Contains various functions \& operations related to FEM calculations. 

The class provides methods organized into different nested classes for\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item \mbox{\hyperlink{classArcaneFemFunctions_1_1MeshOperation}{Mesh\+Operation}}\+: Mesh related operations.
\item Fe\+Operation2\+D/3D\+: Finite element operations at element level.
\item Boundary\+Conditions2\+D/3D\+: Boundary condition related operations. 
\end{DoxyItemize}
